title: Tensura: Egos
description: An addon to Tensura: Reincarnated that adds personalities to skills.
body:
This is an addon for the Tensura: Reincarnated Mod that adds the ability for Unique and Ultimate skills to speak at times. 

A skill can develop a personality through rigorous use or through passive existence.
Every 5 to 30 seconds, a skill may gain 1-10 points of ego until it reaches the default configurable threshold of 500. Skills that cannot be used at will can gain friendliness every 30 seconds until the maximum default threshold of 1000 is reached.

Name your skill via /tregos name after it has reached the maximum amount of friendliness to add several abilities such as a dodge chance or death save chance, even a damage multiplier to it and change the colour of its speech along with adding th name next to the speech lines.

Mute your skill via /tregos mute to silence its speaking, but every time it attempts speech and fails, it will grow annoyed and eventually set itself on cooldown randomly.
